qas.q: SrA Rios is planning to take a train from Germany to Italy for vacation. What antiterrorism practices should he adhere to in an effort to reduce his chances of being singled out for an attack? Select ALL that apply.
qas.a:
-Report any suspicious activity.
-Keep his compartment door locked at all times.
-Have a plan to move from one secure location to another

qas.q: TSgt Holland suspects she may have been exposed to a biological agent, what steps should she take? Select ALL that apply.
qas.a:
-Cover her mouth and nose.
-Get away in a hurry and warn others.
-Seek medical attention.
-Use soap and water to wash areas suspected of exposure.)

qas.q: (T/F) Terrorism is the spontaneous use of violence; it does not include threats of violence to cause fear.
TSgt Brown is assigned overseas and is planning a vacation to a nearby country... Choose three terrorist threat factors that TSgt Brown should consider before going on her vacation.
qas.a:
-Are there any terrorist groups in the area
-Will the local population warn Americans?
-Is the reported terrorist group predictable.

qas.q: What are the terrorism threat levels regional and local US commanders assign for specific personnel, family members, units, and installations?

What FPCON level applies when specific information is received about an increased, more predictable terrorist threat regarding an unknown installation and requiring steps be taken to deter terrorist planning that may effect daily operations.?
How do terrorists select their targets?
(T/F) Active shooter is one or more subjects who participate in a shooting, random or systematic, with the intent to continuously harm others.
Which scenario is an example of an active shooter?
qas.a: A disgruntled NCO, who is fed up with the promotion system, walks through his work center discharging an automatic weapon trying to kill everyone in sight.

qas.q: (T/F) There are never any indicators of a possible active shooter.
Early recognition of a threat can prevent an active shooter incident. Which of the following situations may be pre-attack indicators?
qas.a:
-Aggression toward coworkers
-Repeated violations of policies
-Presence of unauthorized weapons
-Anti American statements

qas.q: (T/F) When first responders approach an active shooter scene, shout out to them so they know your barricade location and wave them over to you.
When first responders arrive at an active shooter scene, you have the responsibility to support their efforts. How can you support the first responders?
qas.a:
-Raise your hands and keep them visible
-Remain calm and follow instructions
-Avoid pointing, yelling, and screaming

qas.q: (T/F) An active shooter's physical description is not relevant when providing information to first responders; instead only provide the shooter's location, number of weapons, and types of weapons.
In a deployed environment, you must REACT. What does the "C" in REACT represent?
In a deployed environment, you must REACT. What does the "R" in REACT represent?
What hostile intelligence collection method is the process of obtaining military, political, commercial, or secret information by spies, secret agents, or illegal monitoring devices?
When Airmen implement effective counterintelligence measures, what are the benefits? Select ALL that apply.
qas.a:
-Information is protected from foreign intelligence agents
-Gathered intelligence protects against espionage
-Foreign powers are denied access to vital US technology
-Assassination attempts on behalf of international terrorists are thwarted

qas.q: Which situations should be reported? Select ALL that apply.
qas.a:
-Contact with foreign diplomatic offices for other than official duties.
-Unauthorized attempts to bypass automated information system security devices.

qas.q: What manipulation technique should be reported when an FIE operative develops a sexual relationship with an insider to draw in the target?
What manipulation technique should be reported when an FIE threatens to disclose his/her relationship with an insider?
(T/F) You should report any hostile intelligence threats incidents, or indicators to AFOSI immediately.
